data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"86c8-2d40","generatedAt":"2026-04-16T16:44:33Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"File impact as first-class ticket field with Jira bridge surfacing","description":"Structured FILE_IMPACT event type replaces ad-hoc markdown. Adds CLI, Jira bridge surfacing, migration, and consumer refactors.","successCriteria":["FILE_IMPACT event type supported by ticket-lib.sh write_commit_event and compiled by ticket-reducer.py into file_impact array-of-{path,reason}.","ticket set-file-impact/get-file-impact CLI; ticket show includes file_impact field.","Jira outbound bridge surfaces file impact via (a) issue property dso.file_impact through AcliClient._direct_rest_put and (b) formatted comment deduped by UUID marker. Inbound ignores the property.","bridge-outbound.py handles FILE_IMPACT explicitly; BRIDGE_ALERT with reason FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED on property PUT failure.","update-artifacts.sh migration phase file-impact-v1 scans tickets for ## File Impact markdown, writes FILE_IMPACT events; idempotent; test suite (well-formed, malformed, idempotency).","Refactor enrich-file-impact.sh (storage to set-file-impact; LLM stays), sprint-drift-check.sh and sprint-review-scope-check.sh to use get-file-impact."]},"stories":[{"id":"b9ac-2459","title":"Write failing integration tests for Jira bridge
